name: terrafuse
description: Open-source geospatial fusion for DGGS-native analysis and common operating pictures.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @terrafuse/web" "npm run dev -w @terrafuse/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @terrafuse/core && npm run build -w @terrafuse/api && npm run build -w @terrafuse/web
